revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT

revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{nosubst}} {{high-use}} {{lua|Module:Outdent}} {{Template shortcut|od|out}} [[WP:THREAD|Threading of replies on talk pages]] is done using indentation and lists. This template is used for [[Wikipedia:Indentation#Outdenting|''out''denting]] a reply on a talk page when indentation gets too deep. == Usage == {{tlx|od|integer}} or {{tlx|od|indentation wikitext}}. Integer examples: {{tlx|od|5}}, {{tlx|od|-15}}, {{tlx|od|11|r{{=}}y}}. Indentation examples: {{tlx|od|:::::}}, {{tlx|od|*::::::}}, {{tlx|od|**:::#}}. == Parameters == ;{{para|1|indent}} : Supports two modes: literal indentation or an integer. In literal indentation mode the value may contain : (indents), * (unnumbered list), and # (numbered list). It is recommended to copy the colons, asterisks, and hashes from the start of the previous message. In integer mode, the value is interpreted as number of indents (:). Default value is 10. Supported range is from -40 to 40. A negative integer is the same as positive integer with {{para|reverse|y}}. ;{{para|2|y}} : Set it to add a link to [[Wikipedia:Indentation#Outdenting]]. {{tlx|od|5|y}} produces: {{od|5|y}} ;{{para|r|y}} (aliases {{para|reverse|y}}, {{para|indent|y}}, {{para|in|y}}) :Reverses the outdentation to become indentation and vice versa. ==Examples== ===With indentation wikitext===
::::Previous post, indented with four colons. {{Outdent|::::}} New post. ''displays as'' ::::Previous post, indented with four colons. {{Outdent|::::}} New post.
=== Positive integer ===
::::::Previous post, indented 6 levels. {{Outdent|6}} New post. ''displays as'' ::::::Previous post, indented 6 levels. {{Outdent|6}} New post.
=== With separate indent === To not outdent all the way to the left margin, indent the {{tl|outdent}} template itself using colons:
::::::Previous post, indented 6 levels. ::{{Outdent|4}} New post. ''displays as'' ::::::Previous post, indented 6 levels. ::{{Outdent|4}} New post.
=== Indent ===
Using {{para|reverse|y}}: ::::::Previous post, indented 6 levels. ::{{Outdent|4}} Start of a new post indented 2 levels using a bar of length 6−2=4. ::{{Outdent|5|reverse=yes}} :::::::Indent to indentation level 7 using a reversed bar of length 7−2=5. ''displays as'' ::::::Previous post, indented 6 levels. ::{{Outdent|4}} Start of a new post indented 2 levels using a bar of length 6−2=4. ::{{Outdent|5|reverse=yes}} :::::::Indent to indentation level 7 using a reversed bar of length 7−2=5.
Or with a negative integer:
::::::Original conversation. ::::::{{od|-3}} :::::::::Afterthought. :::::::{{od|2}} :::::::Continuation of original conversation. ''displays as'' ::::::Original conversation. ::::::{{od|-3}} :::::::::Afterthought. :::::::{{od|2}} :::::::Continuation of original conversation.
== CSS and hide == This template is contained in the CSS class "outdent-template". Users who would prefer not to see the template can add the following line to their custom CSS ([[Special:MyPage/common.css]]): .outdent-template { display: none; } == See also == * {{tl|Outdent2}} — rather than a bar on the previous line, produces a bracketed arrow on the same line. * [[Wikipedia:Indentation|Wikipedia:Indentation (WP:INDENT)]] * [[Wikipedia:Talk page guidelines|Wikipedia:Talk page guidelines (WP:TALK)]] {{Inline talk templates}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Inline talk templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{nosubst}} {{high-use}} {{lua|Module:Outdent}} {{Template shortcut|od|out}} [[WP:THREAD|Threading of replies on talk pages]] is done using indentation and lists. This template is used for [[Wikipedia:Indentation#Outdenting|''out''denting]] a reply on a talk page when indentation gets too deep. == Usage == {{tlx|od|integer}} or {{tlx|od|indentation wikitext}}. Integer examples: {{tlx|od|5}}, {{tlx|od|-15}}, {{tlx|od|11|r{{=}}y}}. Indentation examples: {{tlx|od|:::::}}, {{tlx|od|*::::::}}, {{tlx|od|**:::#}}. == Parameters == ;{{para|1|indent}} : Supports two modes: literal indentation or an integer. In literal indentation mode the value may contain : (indents), * (unnumbered list), and # (numbered list). It is recommended to copy the colons, asterisks, and hashes from the start of the previous message. In integer mode, the value is interpreted as number of indents (:). Default value is 10. Supported range is from -40 to 40. A negative integer is the same as positive integer with {{para|reverse|y}}. ;{{para|2|y}} : Set it to add a link to [[Wikipedia:Indentation#Outdenting]]. {{tlx|od|5|y}} produces: {{od|5|y}} ;{{para|r|y}} (aliases {{para|reverse|y}}, {{para|indent|y}}, {{para|in|y}}) :Reverses the outdentation to become indentation and vice versa. ==Examples== ===With indentation wikitext===
::::Previous post, indented with four colons. {{Outdent|::::}} New post. ''displays as'' ::::Previous post, indented with four colons. {{Outdent|::::}} New post.
=== Positive integer ===
::::::Previous post, indented 6 levels. {{Outdent|6}} New post. ''displays as'' ::::::Previous post, indented 6 levels. {{Outdent|6}} New post.
=== With separate indent === To not outdent all the way to the left margin, indent the {{tl|outdent}} template itself using colons:
::::::Previous post, indented 6 levels. ::{{Outdent|4}} New post. ''displays as'' ::::::Previous post, indented 6 levels. ::{{Outdent|4}} New post.
=== Indent ===
Using {{para|reverse|y}}: ::::::Previous post, indented 6 levels. ::{{Outdent|4}} Start of a new post indented 2 levels using a bar of length 6−2=4. ::{{Outdent|5|reverse=yes}} :::::::Indent to indentation level 7 using a reversed bar of length 7−2=5. ''displays as'' ::::::Previous post, indented 6 levels. ::{{Outdent|4}} Start of a new post indented 2 levels using a bar of length 6−2=4. ::{{Outdent|5|reverse=yes}} :::::::Indent to indentation level 7 using a reversed bar of length 7−2=5.
Or with a negative integer:
::::::Original conversation. ::::::{{od|-3}} :::::::::Afterthought. :::::::{{od|2}} :::::::Continuation of original conversation. ''displays as'' ::::::Original conversation. ::::::{{od|-3}} :::::::::Afterthought. :::::::{{od|2}} :::::::Continuation of original conversation.
== CSS and hide == This template is contained in the CSS class "outdent-template". Users who would prefer not to see the template can add the following line to their custom CSS ([[Special:MyPage/common.css]]): .outdent-template { display: none; } == See also == * {{tl|Outdent2}} — rather than a bar on the previous line, produces a bracketed arrow on the same line. * [[Wikipedia:Indentation|Wikipedia:Indentation (WP:INDENT)]] * [[Wikipedia:Talk page guidelines|Wikipedia:Talk page guidelines (WP:TALK)]] {{Inline talk templates}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Inline talk templates]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{nosubst}} {{high-use}} {{lua|Module:Outdent}} {{Template shortcut|od|out}} [[WP:THREAD|Threading of replies on talk pages]] is done using indentation and lists. This template is used for [[Wikipedia:Indentation#Outdenting|''out''denting]] a reply on a talk page when indentation gets too deep. == Usage == {{tlx|od|integer}} or {{tlx|od|indentation wikitext}}. Integer examples: {{tlx|od|5}}, {{tlx|od|-15}}, {{tlx|od|11|r{{=}}y}}. Indentation examples: {{tlx|od|:::::}}, {{tlx|od|*::::::}}, {{tlx|od|**:::#}}. == Parameters == ;{{para|1|indent}} : Supports two modes: literal indentation or an integer. In literal indentation mode the value may contain : (indents), * (unnumbered list), and # (numbered list). It is recommended to copy the colons, asterisks, and hashes from the start of the previous message. In integer mode, the value is interpreted as number of indents (:). Default value is 10. Supported range is from -40 to 40. A negative integer is the same as positive integer with {{para|reverse|y}}. ;{{para|2|y}} : Set it to add a link to [[Wikipedia:Indentation#Outdenting]]. {{tlx|od|5|y}} produces: {{od|5|y}} ;{{para|r|y}} (aliases {{para|reverse|y}}, {{para|indent|y}}, {{para|in|y}}) :Reverses the outdentation to become indentation and vice versa. ==Examples== ===With indentation wikitext===
::::Previous post, indented with four colons. {{Outdent|::::}} New post. ''displays as'' ::::Previous post, indented with four colons. {{Outdent|::::}} New post.
=== Positive integer ===
::::::Previous post, indented 6 levels. {{Outdent|6}} New post. ''displays as'' ::::::Previous post, indented 6 levels. {{Outdent|6}} New post.
=== With separate indent === To not outdent all the way to the left margin, indent the {{tl|outdent}} template itself using colons:
::::::Previous post, indented 6 levels. ::{{Outdent|4}} New post. ''displays as'' ::::::Previous post, indented 6 levels. ::{{Outdent|4}} New post.
=== Indent ===
Using {{para|reverse|y}}: ::::::Previous post, indented 6 levels. ::{{Outdent|4}} Start of a new post indented 2 levels using a bar of length 6−2=4. ::{{Outdent|5|reverse=yes}} :::::::Indent to indentation level 7 using a reversed bar of length 7−2=5. ''displays as'' ::::::Previous post, indented 6 levels. ::{{Outdent|4}} Start of a new post indented 2 levels using a bar of length 6−2=4. ::{{Outdent|5|reverse=yes}} :::::::Indent to indentation level 7 using a reversed bar of length 7−2=5.
Or with a negative integer:
::::::Original conversation. ::::::{{od|-3}} :::::::::Afterthought. :::::::{{od|2}} :::::::Continuation of original conversation. ''displays as'' ::::::Original conversation. ::::::{{od|-3}} :::::::::Afterthought. :::::::{{od|2}} :::::::Continuation of original conversation.
== CSS and hide == This template is contained in the CSS class "outdent-template". Users who would prefer not to see the template can add the following line to their custom CSS ([[Special:MyPage/common.css]]): .outdent-template { display: none; } == See also == * {{tl|Outdent2}} — rather than a bar on the previous line, produces a bracketed arrow on the same line. * [[Wikipedia:Indentation|Wikipedia:Indentation (WP:INDENT)]] * [[Wikipedia:Talk page guidelines|Wikipedia:Talk page guidelines (WP:TALK)]] {{Inline talk templates}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Inline talk templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{nosubst}} {{high-use}} {{lua|Module:Outdent}} {{Template shortcut|od|out}} [[WP:THREAD|Threading of replies on talk pages]] is done using indentation and lists. This template is used for [[Wikipedia:Indentation#Outdenting|''out''denting]] a reply on a talk page when indentation gets too deep. == Usage == {{tlx|od|integer}} or {{tlx|od|indentation wikitext}}. Integer examples: {{tlx|od|5}}, {{tlx|od|-15}}, {{tlx|od|11|r{{=}}y}}. Indentation examples: {{tlx|od|:::::}}, {{tlx|od|*::::::}}, {{tlx|od|**:::#}}. == Parameters == ;{{para|1|indent}} : Supports two modes: literal indentation or an integer. In literal indentation mode the value may contain : (indents), * (unnumbered list), and # (numbered list). It is recommended to copy the colons, asterisks, and hashes from the start of the previous message. In integer mode, the value is interpreted as number of indents (:). Default value is 10. Supported range is from -40 to 40. A negative integer is the same as positive integer with {{para|reverse|y}}. ;{{para|2|y}} : Set it to add a link to [[Wikipedia:Indentation#Outdenting]]. {{tlx|od|5|y}} produces: {{od|5|y}} ;{{para|r|y}} (aliases {{para|reverse|y}}, {{para|indent|y}}, {{para|in|y}}) :Reverses the outdentation to become indentation and vice versa. ==Examples== ===With indentation wikitext===
::::Previous post, indented with four colons. {{Outdent|::::}} New post. ''displays as'' ::::Previous post, indented with four colons. {{Outdent|::::}} New post.
=== Positive integer ===
::::::Previous post, indented 6 levels. {{Outdent|6}} New post. ''displays as'' ::::::Previous post, indented 6 levels. {{Outdent|6}} New post.
=== With separate indent === To not outdent all the way to the left margin, indent the {{tl|outdent}} template itself using colons:
::::::Previous post, indented 6 levels. ::{{Outdent|4}} New post. ''displays as'' ::::::Previous post, indented 6 levels. ::{{Outdent|4}} New post.
=== Indent ===
Using {{para|reverse|y}}: ::::::Previous post, indented 6 levels. ::{{Outdent|4}} Start of a new post indented 2 levels using a bar of length 6−2=4. ::{{Outdent|5|reverse=yes}} :::::::Indent to indentation level 7 using a reversed bar of length 7−2=5. ''displays as'' ::::::Previous post, indented 6 levels. ::{{Outdent|4}} Start of a new post indented 2 levels using a bar of length 6−2=4. ::{{Outdent|5|reverse=yes}} :::::::Indent to indentation level 7 using a reversed bar of length 7−2=5.
Or with a negative integer:
::::::Original conversation. ::::::{{od|-3}} :::::::::Afterthought. :::::::{{od|2}} :::::::Continuation of original conversation. ''displays as'' ::::::Original conversation. ::::::{{od|-3}} :::::::::Afterthought. :::::::{{od|2}} :::::::Continuation of original conversation.
== CSS and hide == This template is contained in the CSS class "outdent-template". Users who would prefer not to see the template can add the following line to their custom CSS ([[Special:MyPage/common.css]]): .outdent-template { display: none; } == See also == * {{tl|Outdent2}} — rather than a bar on the previous line, produces a bracketed arrow on the same line. * [[Wikipedia:Indentation|Wikipedia:Indentation (WP:INDENT)]] * [[Wikipedia:Talk page guidelines|Wikipedia:Talk page guidelines (WP:TALK)]] {{Inline talk templates}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Inline talk templates]] }} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23524127410|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{nosubst}} {{high-use}} {{lua|Module:Outdent}} {{Template shortcut|od|out}} [[WP:THREAD|Threading of replies on talk pages]] is done using indentation and lists. This template is used for [[Wikipedia:Indentation#Outdenting|''out''denting]] a reply on a talk page when indentation gets too deep. == Usage == {{tlx|od|integer}} or {{tlx|od|indentation wikitext}}. Integer examples: {{tlx|od|5}}, {{tlx|od|-15}}, {{tlx|od|11|r{{=}}y}}. Indentation examples: {{tlx|od|:::::}}, {{tlx|od|*::::::}}, {{tlx|od|**:::#}}. == Parameters == ;{{para|1|indent}} : Supports two modes: literal indentation or an integer. In literal indentation mode the value may contain : (indents), * (unnumbered list), and # (numbered list). It is recommended to copy the colons, asterisks, and hashes from the start of the previous message. In integer mode, the value is interpreted as number of indents (:). Default value is 10. Supported range is from -40 to 40. A negative integer is the same as positive integer with {{para|reverse|y}}. ;{{para|2|y}} : Set it to add a link to [[Wikipedia:Indentation#Outdenting]]. {{tlx|od|5|y}} produces: {{od|5|y}} ;{{para|r|y}} (aliases {{para|reverse|y}}, {{para|indent|y}}, {{para|in|y}}) :Reverses the outdentation to become indentation and vice versa. ==Examples== ===With indentation wikitext===
::::Previous post, indented with four colons. {{Outdent|::::}} New post. ''displays as'' ::::Previous post, indented with four colons. {{Outdent|::::}} New post.
=== Positive integer ===
::::::Previous post, indented 6 levels. {{Outdent|6}} New post. ''displays as'' ::::::Previous post, indented 6 levels. {{Outdent|6}} New post.
=== With separate indent === To not outdent all the way to the left margin, indent the {{tl|outdent}} template itself using colons:
::::::Previous post, indented 6 levels. ::{{Outdent|4}} New post. ''displays as'' ::::::Previous post, indented 6 levels. ::{{Outdent|4}} New post.
=== Indent ===
Using {{para|reverse|y}}: ::::::Previous post, indented 6 levels. ::{{Outdent|4}} Start of a new post indented 2 levels using a bar of length 6−2=4. ::{{Outdent|5|reverse=yes}} :::::::Indent to indentation level 7 using a reversed bar of length 7−2=5. ''displays as'' ::::::Previous post, indented 6 levels. ::{{Outdent|4}} Start of a new post indented 2 levels using a bar of length 6−2=4. ::{{Outdent|5|reverse=yes}} :::::::Indent to indentation level 7 using a reversed bar of length 7−2=5.
Or with a negative integer:
::::::Original conversation. ::::::{{od|-3}} :::::::::Afterthought. :::::::{{od|2}} :::::::Continuation of original conversation. ''displays as'' ::::::Original conversation. ::::::{{od|-3}} :::::::::Afterthought. :::::::{{od|2}} :::::::Continuation of original conversation.
== CSS and hide == This template is contained in the CSS class "outdent-template". Users who would prefer not to see the template can add the following line to their custom CSS ([[Special:MyPage/common.css]]): .outdent-template { display: none; } == See also == * {{tl|Outdent2}} — rather than a bar on the previous line, produces a bracketed arrow on the same line. * [[Wikipedia:Indentation|Wikipedia:Indentation (WP:INDENT)]] * [[Wikipedia:Talk page guidelines|Wikipedia:Talk page guidelines (WP:TALK)]] {{Inline talk templates}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Inline talk templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24957526818|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{nosubst}} {{high-use}} {{lua|Module:Outdent}} {{Template shortcut|od|out}} [[WP:THREAD|Threading of replies on talk pages]] is done using indentation and lists. This template is used for [[Wikipedia:Indentation#Outdenting|''out''denting]] a reply on a talk page when indentation gets too deep. == Usage == {{tlx|od|integer}} or {{tlx|od|indentation wikitext}}. Integer examples: {{tlx|od|5}}, {{tlx|od|-15}}, {{tlx|od|11|r{{=}}y}}. Indentation examples: {{tlx|od|:::::}}, {{tlx|od|*::::::}}, {{tlx|od|**:::#}}. == Parameters == ;{{para|1|indent}} : Supports two modes: literal indentation or an integer. In literal indentation mode the value may contain : (indents), * (unnumbered list), and # (numbered list). It is recommended to copy the colons, asterisks, and hashes from the start of the previous message. In integer mode, the value is interpreted as number of indents (:). Default value is 10. Supported range is from -40 to 40. A negative integer is the same as positive integer with {{para|reverse|y}}. ;{{para|2|y}} : Set it to add a link to [[Wikipedia:Indentation#Outdenting]]. {{tlx|od|5|y}} produces: {{od|5|y}} ;{{para|r|y}} (aliases {{para|reverse|y}}, {{para|indent|y}}, {{para|in|y}}) :Reverses the outdentation to become indentation and vice versa. ==Examples== ===With indentation wikitext===
::::Previous post, indented with four colons. {{Outdent|::::}} New post. ''displays as'' ::::Previous post, indented with four colons. {{Outdent|::::}} New post.
=== Positive integer ===
::::::Previous post, indented 6 levels. {{Outdent|6}} New post. ''displays as'' ::::::Previous post, indented 6 levels. {{Outdent|6}} New post.
=== With separate indent === To not outdent all the way to the left margin, indent the {{tl|outdent}} template itself using colons:
::::::Previous post, indented 6 levels. ::{{Outdent|4}} New post. ''displays as'' ::::::Previous post, indented 6 levels. ::{{Outdent|4}} New post.
=== Indent ===
Using {{para|reverse|y}}: ::::::Previous post, indented 6 levels. ::{{Outdent|4}} Start of a new post indented 2 levels using a bar of length 6−2=4. ::{{Outdent|5|reverse=yes}} :::::::Indent to indentation level 7 using a reversed bar of length 7−2=5. ''displays as'' ::::::Previous post, indented 6 levels. ::{{Outdent|4}} Start of a new post indented 2 levels using a bar of length 6−2=4. ::{{Outdent|5|reverse=yes}} :::::::Indent to indentation level 7 using a reversed bar of length 7−2=5.
Or with a negative integer:
::::::Original conversation. ::::::{{od|-3}} :::::::::Afterthought. :::::::{{od|2}} :::::::Continuation of original conversation. ''displays as'' ::::::Original conversation. ::::::{{od|-3}} :::::::::Afterthought. :::::::{{od|2}} :::::::Continuation of original conversation.
== CSS and hide == This template is contained in the CSS class "outdent-template". Users who would prefer not to see the template can add the following line to their custom CSS ([[Special:MyPage/common.css]]): .outdent-template { display: none; } == See also == * {{tl|Outdent2}} — rather than a bar on the previous line, produces a bracketed arrow on the same line. * [[Wikipedia:Indentation|Wikipedia:Indentation (WP:INDENT)]] * [[Wikipedia:Talk page guidelines|Wikipedia:Talk page guidelines (WP:TALK)]] {{Inline talk templates}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Inline talk templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
